bupt.ta.ai

类 AIMatchService.ApplicantRecommendation

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.ai.AIMatchService.ApplicantRecommendation
  • 封闭类:
    AIMatchService

    public static class AIMatchService.ApplicantRecommendation
extends java.lang.Object
    For MO: enrich applicants with match score, missing skills, and workload recommendation.

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      Application application
      Application under review.
      int currentWorkload
      Count of jobs the applicant is already selected for.
      AIMatchService.MatchResult matchResult
      Rule-based skill match.
      TAProfile profile
      Applicant profile (may be null).
      boolean workloadBalanced
      true when workload is at or below average (prefer for balance).

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
      ApplicantRecommendation(Application app, TAProfile profile, AIMatchService.MatchResult match, int workload, boolean balanced) 

    • 方法概要

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • 字段详细资料

      • application

        public final Application application
        Application under review.

      • profile

        public final TAProfile profile
        Applicant profile (may be null).

      • matchResult

        public final AIMatchService.MatchResult matchResult
        Rule-based skill match.

      • currentWorkload

        public final int currentWorkload
        Count of jobs the applicant is already selected for.

      • workloadBalanced

        public final boolean workloadBalanced
        true when workload is at or below average (prefer for balance).

    • 构造器详细资料

      • ApplicantRecommendation

        public ApplicantRecommendation(Application app,
                               TAProfile profile,
                               AIMatchService.MatchResult match,
                               int workload,
                               boolean balanced)
